breaking.title: 2 dead and 3 wounded in shooting near Toronto street festival, police say
breaking.summary: Two people have been killed and three others wounded in a shooting near a Toronto street festival, prompting police to warn of an active shooter before later saying the scene had been secured

breaking.title: Monsoon tracker LIVE: Cloudburst floods hotels, houses in Pahalgam; heavy to very heavy rain lash parts of India
breaking.summary: Continuous heavy rainfall on July 11 triggered a major landslide scare in Shimla’s Sanjauli area, forcing residents of Bothwell Estate to remain outdoors since around 3 a.m amid fears that their houses could collapse

breaking.title: US Hits 140 Iranian Targets After Hormuz Closure, Tehran Strikes UAE, Qatar
breaking.summary: The latest strikes threatened an already fragile interim deal aimed at ending Iran war

breaking.title: Indian-Origin Google Techie Shot Dead By Husband At US Home, Son Injured
breaking.summary: Sheetal Wrzesien was an engineering leader at Google with more than two decades of experience

breaking.title: Iran Shuts Hormuz After Attack On 'Unauthorised' Ship, US Begins New Strikes
breaking.summary: US is demanding that Iran publicly state it will stop attacks on ships in the strait

breaking.title: Bangladesh bars media from publishing Hasina statements
breaking.summary: Bangladesh's government has ordered all media to stop broadcasting Sheikh Hasina's statements. This directive follows a court ban on publishing content from the former prime minister. Several outlets published an interview with Hasina, which prompted the government's action. A journalist stated Hasina remains the country's paramount leader and should have security. She has been the target of past assassination attempts and attacks.

breaking.title: Russians urged to work from home amid fuel crisis
breaking.summary: Russia's Novosibirsk region is urging remote work and reduced car travel. This comes amid a deepening fuel crisis affecting many Russian areas. Ukrainian strikes on oil refineries have significantly impacted fuel supplies. One major facility in Omsk was recently disabled by an attack. This situation has led to fuel shortages and rationing across Russia.

breaking.title: Delhi Techie Arrested A Month After Wife Found Dead At Mussoorie Homestay
breaking.summary: The husband, an IT firm employee, was apprehended from the Madhu Vihar area of east Delhi
